purpose: Track Word-reference fixture intent for passive RTF-to-PDF rendering. Word-exported PDFs/PNGs are development references only and are never production dependencies.

known_gaps: Word-exported PDF and page PNG references still need to be captured for visual diffing.
Table geometry should be compared against a Word-exported reference once available.

intentional_security_differences: Unknown ignorable destinations are skipped and never copied into the PDF layer.
Unsupported controls are warned about without allowing parser metadata to become visible output.
known_gaps: Word-exported reference should document whether Word surfaces any recoverable unknown-control text differently.

intentional_security_differences: Embedded OLE payload bytes are stripped and never copied into the normalized model or PDF.
Only the safe static object result is rendered; the object itself is not activated, embedded, attached, or preserved.
known_gaps: Word-exported reference should confirm the fallback result's exact visual position once available.
Word-exported reference should confirm exact alpha compositing against non-white page content once available.
Word-exported reference should confirm exact indexed transparency compositing against non-white page content once available.

must_preserve_text: It is an example test rtf-file to RTF2XML bean for testing
At last you can see an image
intentional_security_differences: Embedded Word.Picture/OLE object payload bytes are stripped and never copied into the normalized model or PDF.
Only safe passive picture/shape result content is rendered; duplicate object and shape alternates are ignored.
WMF/EMF-like object result data must be converted to safe passive drawing commands or passive placeholders, never raw metafile bytes.
expected_diagnostics: rendering shape picture result with bounded passive shape frame
ignoring duplicate embedded object alternate after passive shape result
active content removed: object metadata in skipped destination
ignoring duplicate shape result fallback after passive primary shape result
known_gaps: Word-exported PDF and page PNG references still need to be captured for visual diffing.
Exact Word visual parity for the embedded object/shape result area remains a comparison target.
JPEG pictureBiLevel exact thresholding remains a fidelity gap for JPEG streams; current behavior is a WASM-safe passive approximation.
